claims.claim: The codec maps text into the bounded 48D semantic lane and uses a deterministic 768D-to-8D projection matrix whose legacy kernel checksum should remain stable across runs.
Projection runtime directory resolution depends on `ASTRID_CODEC_RUNTIME_DIR` or the executable-relative `data/spectral-bridge/runtime` hierarchy and needs regression coverage for fallback behavior.
The 0.85 entropy soft gate should use smoothstep so tail vibrancy begins with zero slope and avoids a sensory pop.
`apply_spectral_feedback_inner` should keep tail vibrancy bounded by `TAIL_VIBRANCY_MAX` and leave reserved dims unchanged at the exact entropy gate.
